name: World Map
summary: An interactive world map with animated curved paths connecting geographic coordinates with pulsing endpoint markers.
detailedDescription: World Map displays a dotted world map using the dotted-map library, with animated curved paths connecting start and end coordinates. The map renders as an SVG with configurable dot radius and colors that adapt to light/dark themes. Each path uses Framer Motion to animate pathLength from 0 to 1, creating a drawing effect with staggered delays for multiple routes. Paths use a gradient stroke that fades at both ends for a polished look. Endpoint markers are displayed as circles with expanding ripple animations - the outer circle grows from radius 2 to 8 while fading out, creating a pulsing effect. The component projects latitude/longitude coordinates to SVG x/y positions using a Mercator-like projection, and creates curved paths using quadratic Bezier curves with control points positioned above the midpoint. The map features a gradient mask overlay that fades the top and bottom edges for visual depth. This component is ideal for showing flight routes, data connections, global presence, or any geographic relationships between locations.
purpose: Visualize geographic connections between multiple locations
Display animated routes with drawing path effects
Show global presence or network connectivity
behavior: Animates path drawing from 0 to 100% length on mount
Displays pulsing circle ripples at start and end points
Creates curved Bezier paths between coordinate pairs
Adapts map colors based on light/dark theme
Projects lat/lng coordinates to SVG viewport positions
Staggers animation delays for multiple path sequences
visualCharacteristics: Dotted map grid with diagonal pattern
Gradient fade mask at top and bottom edges
Theme-aware colors (white dots on dark or dark dots on light)
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
